All right, I just want to touch really quick on lead generation and lead nurture. Again, everything is pretty much the same as it would be for a six-week or 42 challenge. Now, the cool thing about 28 Days is it's a fresh wrapper. For instance, you could take what maybe was working for a 42-day detox or six-week challenge, and just change it to 28-day. You can reuse a lot of the same assets. I would always suggest creating new ads, but a lot of stuff can be done very simply, very quickly just like that. Just changing the text. Same thing goes for your lead nurture as you're texting people, whatever's been working for you, the scripts you've been using, just substitute 28-day in for six weeks and make sure that there's nothing that says, you know, we're going to work out for six weeks. If this copy says three times a week for six weeks, you say three times a week for four weeks. Like it's very, very simple to sub out, but I just want to cover this so you don't overcomplicate it. Everything stays relatively the same. You're just tweaking out 28-day for six weeks. And a lot of times you'll find if you've had trouble with lead generation or even people coming in, a shorter term commitment, a lower price, and just a different wrapper will oftentimes give you a boost that you need to get better results.
